name: MA'EN JUTSU: EN'MI (FIENDFIRE TECHNIQUE: SEED OF FLAME)

description.value:
Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 4

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 15

Components: F, Mas, S

You carve fiery seals into your flesh, granting you a +1 bonus to Perform checks made to perform Katon techniques, and such techniques deal 1 additional fire damage.This techniques takes up one seal slot, and you deal yourself 1 damage when performing it. The seal's effects do not stack with itself.

Mastery: The third step requires ECL 8 or higher, and allows you to spend 2 additional Chakra and deal yourself 2 additional damage to double the seal's bonuses.
